title: Brewery Cups
description: Change vanilla Potion texture of Brewery drinks.
body:
### Features
Changes the textures of drinks added by the Brewery plugin


### INSTALLATION:
1. Download [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads)
**OR** [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn).
2. Download Resourcepack.
3. Drop Resourcepack to resourcepack folder.
